creator: marcel@scc.nl
text:
Due to my misunderstanding, the port has been closed for the wrong reason.
The ports are fixed now and also work when the linuxulator is built into
the kernel with "options COMPAT_LINUX".

COMPAT_LINUX *is* actively supported.

My apologies to Dean; the pointy hat's on me.

-- 
Marcel Moolenaar                                  mailto:marcel@scc.nl

Amsterdam, The Netherlands                         tel: +31 20 4200655
